fileNodes.name: App.tsx
fileNodes.summary: The root application component that manages user authentication state, fetches initial logs/data for administrators, and routes users to either the admin dashboard, the driver portal, or login views.

fileNodes.name: AnalyticsView.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Displays visual business intelligence graphs, KPI metrics, route progress statistics, and driver utilization charts using Recharts.

fileNodes.name: DashboardView.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Serves as the primary operational workspace for administrators, listing overall shipment indicators, recent actions, and integrating the live ControlCenter maps.

fileNodes.name: DriverPortal.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Provides the dedicated interface for drivers, allowing them to view active assignments, update shipment dispatch statuses, record reached checkpoints, and sign out.

fileNodes.name: FleetView.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Implements the fleet administration panel, displaying driver counts, availability statuses, and active route progress cards in a clear tabular grid.

fileNodes.name: Landing.tsx
fileNodes.summary: The unauthenticated landing page of the application, showing product overview, features, pricing links, and quick-access login/register triggers.

fileNodes.name: Login.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Standard login/register form component that communicates with authentication services to request tokens and updates the global user session state.

fileNodes.name: MetricsGrid.tsx
fileNodes.summary: A lightweight layout component showing administrative status metrics (Total Shipments, Active Shipments, Driver Utilization, and On-Time Rate) via API integration.

fileNodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Implements the left sidebar navigation layout for the admin view, letting administrators toggle between the main operational views and log out.

fileNodes.name: config.ts
fileNodes.summary: Application configuration module that exports REST API and WebSocket endpoint URLs determined by environment variables and local dev states.

fileNodes.name: authSlice.ts
fileNodes.summary: Redux slice that manages the authenticated user session, loading states, error responses, and session validation thunks.

fileNodes.name: hooks.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides strongly-typed React Redux hook wrappers `useAppDispatch` and `useAppSelector` for accessing the global store.

fileNodes.name: ci.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow configured to run backend tests (with a PostgreSQL service container) and build the frontend application upon push or pull requests to the main branch.

fileNodes.name: ua-import-map-input.json
fileNodes.summary: Temporary configuration file containing the input list of workspace files for resolving import mappings.

fileNodes.name: ua-import-map-output.json
fileNodes.summary: Temporary configuration file containing the resolved import maps and metrics for the workspace files.

fileNodes.name: ua-scan-files.json
fileNodes.summary: Temporary configuration file storing the complete list of files identified during workspace scanning, including their languages and categories.
